zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空格局
zh.content:
当前艾达币兑美元维持弱势震荡，价格围绕0.162附近运行，反弹动能不足，上方均线压制明显，短线仍偏空整理结构性承压缺乏趋势性突破市场情绪偏谨慎

技术指标方面，MACD持续为负值，动能柱偏弱，显示空头占优；价格低于SMA20（0.1654），中期均线压制延续RSI暂缺但短线或处于中性偏弱区间缺乏上行动能确认

支撑位关注0.160附近，若跌破可能测试0.158区域；上方阻力位在0.165及0.168，突破需放量确认否则仍以震荡为主区间运行概率较高

交易策略建议以反弹做空为主，等待价格接近0.165上方分批布局空单，止损放在0.168上方，目标0.160一线若放量突破则需及时止损

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bearish-to-neutral structure, trading slightly below its 20-day simple moving average at 0.1654. Price action around 0.1622 reflects ongoing consolidation after a short-term decline, with limited bullish momentum. The inability to reclaim the SMA suggests sellers still maintain control, though the tight daily range indicates slowing volatility and potential base formation near current levels short term outlook remains cautious.

Momentum indicators reinforce a weak bias, with MACD registering a negative reading at -0.00196, signaling continued bearish momentum despite recent stabilization. Absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold precision, but price behavior below the SMA suggests downside pressure persists. Overall indicator alignment points to a market in corrective phase rather than trend reversal, with buyers yet to establish strong confirmation of recovery.

Immediate support is identified near 0.1606, aligning with the session low, followed by a psychological floor around 0.1600. A breakdown below this zone could expose further downside toward lower consolidation levels. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 0.1654, corresponding to the 20-day SMA, with stronger resistance near 0.1680–0.1700 where prior supply zones may re-emerge Market structure suggests range trading until a decisive breakout occurs.

Given the prevailing bearish tilt, short-term traders may consider waiting for either a confirmed breakout above the 20-day SMA or a retest of support near 0.1600 for potential mean-reversion entries. Risk management remains essential due to low volatility compression, which can precede sharp directional moves. Position sizing should remain conservative until momentum indicators show clearer divergence or trend reversal signals.
